name: Tony's Lemony Veal Piccata
recipeIngredient: 1 Sm Lemon, peeled and whites removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust the veal with flour.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Sauté in the oil until lightly browned, about 2-3 minutes. Remove from pan and keep warm.
4. Pour off any remaining oil. Add the garlic and sauté several seconds.
5. Add wine or sherry and bring to a boil.
6. Reduce to 1/3 cup. Stir in capers and lemon.
7. Return to boil. Swirl in the butter and parsley.
8. Dip the veal slices into the sauce, place on platter, and top with remaining sauce.
9. Garnish with more parsley and some lemon slices.
10. Enjoy!
